sentences.translationEn: The company announced the employee of the month.

sentences.translation: Nagradu je osvojila radnica po imenu Ferida.
sentences.translationEn: An employee named Farida won the title.

sentences.arabic: قَدَّمَتِ الشَّرِكَةُ لَهَا شَهَادَةً وَهَدِيَّةً صَغِيرَةً.
sentences.translation: Kompanija joj je uručila certifikat i mali poklon.
sentences.translationEn: The company gave her a certificate and a small gift.

sentences.arabic: سَعِدَتْ فَرِيدَةُ وَشَكَرَتِ الْفَرِيقَ عَلَى دَعْمِهِ.
sentences.translation: Ferida se obradovala i zahvalila timu na podršci.
sentences.translationEn: Farida was happy and thanked the team for their support.
